outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility; positive total GEX (12.67B) suppresses moves, but negative monthly GEX (-9.02B) adds tail risk
outlook.summary: Spot (6646.5) trapped between 0DTE gamma flip (6585) and weekly gamma flip (6713). Dealers long gamma in short-term stabilizes price action. Extreme bearish PCR (3.31) in monthly suggests contrarian bounce potential. Watch 6675 CALL WALL as immediate resistance, 6585 as critical support.

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE CALL OI (10358) just above spot creates immediate dealer hedging resistance. Volume 4765 confirms active positioning.
Significant CALL OI in 0DTE (5417) and WEEKLY (5592) combined with MONTHLY PUT interest (17081). Multi-expiry dealer resistance zone.
Significant OI across ALL expiries: 0DTE CALL (4737), WEEKLY CALL+PUT (6412 combined), MONTHLY CALL+PUT (35965 combined). Critical structural level near spot.
0DTE gamma flip at 6584.78 marks sentiment equilibrium. Below this level, dealers flip to short gamma, amplifying downside moves significantly.
Weekly max pain at 6570 aligns with 0DTE gamma flip zone (distance 0.2%). MM pinning target attracts price action.
Major PUT support in WEEKLY (7445 OI) and MONTHLY (22382 OI). Deep bearish skew (1.44 ratio) confirms strong institutional hedging.
